category_sources: source_facts.description says img2pdf converts images to PDF via direct JPEG inclusion; official README describes lossless raster-image-to-PDF conversion.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name lists the package name as img2pdf.
docs_sources: Official Muffin Gitea repository README includes the usage documentation and says detailed command documentation is available with img2pdf --help.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official source-control project page on gitlab.mister-muffin.de.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and the official README identify direct image-to-PDF conversion with lossless/direct embedding behavior.
